scripts.build: npm run build -w @veolms/shared && npm run build -w @veolms/server && npm run build -w @veolms/client
scripts.build:vercel:client: npm run build -w @veolms/shared && npm run build -w @veolms/client && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src=path.resolve('apps/client/dist'); const dest=path.resolve('dist'); fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});"
